metadata.feature_description: Popup table view of currently filtered IFC entities with lock/unlock rows, protected columns (e.g. IfcClass), and a split layout: top entity table, bottom sheet for quantity surveying or other spreadsheet-style interactions. Data source is searchState.products; optional Univer feasibility spike via adapter.

state.current_objective: Filtered Entities Table View implemented per plan; see execution_log summary.

execution_log.step: Implemented Table entrypoint, popup route, and table protocol wired to searchState.products.
Built Svelte-native EntityGrid (lock/unlock, protected IfcClass/globalId) and BottomSheet for quantity-survey notes.
Created TableEngine adapter, decided to defer Univer for v1, and added isolated Playwright + README docs for spreadsheet tests.

handoff_notes: All plan todos are satisfied. Table popup opens from the main page; fixture mode ?fixture=1 is used by Playwright. Commands: pnpm run test:spreadsheet (headless), pnpm run test:spreadsheet:headed (headed Chromium).

metadata.feature_description: Spreadsheet utilities for the table popup: a Google-Sheets-style formula bar tied to the active cell, intermediate formula support, keyboard navigation, fill-down, and undo/redo across top entity grid and bottom sheet while keeping protected columns read-only.

state.current_objective: Spreadsheet utility plan implemented and verified in headless + headed spreadsheet suites.

execution_log.step: Added shared spreadsheet interaction model (active cell refs, snapshots/history types) and formula evaluation utility with cell refs, ranges, and arithmetic.
Implemented top formula bar UI + global selection semantics across EntityGrid and BottomSheet, including protected-cell behavior.
Implemented keyboard navigation, formula commit/cancel, fill-down action, and undo/redo in table route session state.
Expanded spreadsheet Playwright tests for formula bar, protected cells, fill-down, and undo/redo; updated selectors for input-backed cell values.
Validated with pnpm run check, CI= pnpm run test:spreadsheet, and CI= pnpm run test:spreadsheet:headed.

handoff_notes: All spreadsheet-utility todos complete. Formula bar now reflects selected cell across both surfaces; Apply/Cancel/Fill Down/Undo/Redo are available in the table popup.

metadata.feature_description: Spreadsheet UX refinements: formula reference insertion by clicking cells while composing formulas, drag-range selection, and preserving invalid formula input text instead of replacing with #ERROR.

state.current_objective: Implemented requested spreadsheet interaction fixes and verified all spreadsheet tests.

execution_log.step: Added pointer-driven cell hooks so the route can intercept mousedown/hover/up for spreadsheet-like selection and formula reference picking.
Implemented '= then click cell' formula composition flow so clicked refs are inserted into the current formula expression (e.g., =D2).
Implemented drag multi-cell selection state and range highlighting across both top grid and bottom sheet.
Fixed invalid formula commit behavior to preserve the user's expression rather than replacing with literal #ERROR.
Extended Playwright spreadsheet tests and validated with pnpm run check + CI= pnpm run test:spreadsheet.

handoff_notes: User-requested follow-up behaviors are implemented: click-to-insert formula refs, drag selection, and error-input preservation.
